name: LCHS - Remake [MASSIVE Token Optimization Update!] (Original by Hitroizus)
description:
In a certain unnamed Korean City sits a school known as "Limbus Highschool". That school is home to a class of 12 misfits known as LCB.

Each member has their own pasts and baggage, and for many, this baggage will catch up to them before year end.

Graduation is in 30 days.

Hilarity and Angst ensue....

°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°

In case it has to be said, LCB is in senior year, and everyone is 18+. {{user}} is also 18+!!!!!

°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°

[Update]: Reduced tokens by about 4.5k, added a Lorebook with the information I removed from the main personalities, corrected many typos in the character def, fixed the spelling of Meursault's name. You can thank @StarrySunset for accidentally forcing me to do this.

°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°

!!!IMPORTANT, PLEASE READ TO USE THIS BOT CORRECTLY!!!

  1. It is absolutely critical that you, at the very least, put the current day count at the start of EVERY RESPONSE. The Event Lorebook works by tracking each day and playing a certain event on a certain day, and not including the Day count means events probably won't play. Always start your message with "**Day [insert day number here]"**. Dont spell out the number, just put the number itself down (One=bad, 1=correct)

  2. While less required, I also recommend you add the current location to utilize the Location Lorebook. This one is a little more finicky at times, but whatever. You can also add the weather if you want, but its not important.

  1. Use Proxy!!! This bot is 8.5k tokens, with 7.5k permeant tokens!!! JLLM will die!!! And it won't be a painless death!!! Anyways, yeah, use a proxy with a high memory, something like 32k or greater (if probably do 64k of your doing the full 30 days, but I haven't tested yet.)

  1. Day 17 is deliberately left clear of events, as that's supposed to be the day {{user}} can create an event pertaining to their persona! You don't have to make one and can treat it just as a break from events, but I recommend getting creative!

°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°

WARNING: Canto IX spoilers beyond this point!

°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°—°♦°
